action.reasoning: Observation: Starting experiment with no prior runs or scores. Analysis: Need to establish baseline pipeline quickly per workflow (few epochs + immediate eval for time measurement). Decision: Implement ResNet50 CNN encoder (grayscale adapted, pretrained weights transferred) + LSTM decoder (teacher forcing in train, greedy generate in inference) as simple seq2seq without attention; train 3 epochs with CE loss on padded sequences; log metrics to jsonl; save best on val exprate; create matching predict.py for test set.
